notes: Fixed the month picker dropdown not landing flush with the selected month \u2014 it was measuring the list's scroll position before the browser had actually committed layout for the freshly-opened panel. Now waits a frame first.

Net Worth's Shares / Property & Loans / Assets / Debts subtotals (composition bar, group headers, and the Portfolio tab's Mortgages/Assets/Debts totals) now total everything in that bucket automatically, matching Portfolio Value. Only the single main Net Worth figure still respects each item's include/exclude checkbox.
Added a tap-for-info icon on the Remaining Budget card explaining how Remaining, % Used, and Daily Limit are each calculated.

Fixed the info tooltips (Net Worth, Portfolio Value, Remaining Budget) appearing behind whatever modal was open, and auto-dismissing after 2.5 seconds before they could really be read. They now use the same themed-alert mechanism as the rest of the app \u2014 always on top, stays open until you tap OK, tap outside, or go back.
Confirmed Efficiency Score's tap-for-breakdown (full category-by-category comparison vs last month to date) is fully wired up and working.
